infobox.value: * [Expressways](/wiki/Malaysian_Expressway_System "Malaysian Expressway System") * [Federal](/wiki/Malaysian_Federal_Roads_System "Malaysian Federal Roads System") * [State](/wiki/Malaysian_State_Roads_system "Malaysian State Roads system") | |

(formerly **Swettenham Road**) is a major road in [Kuala Lumpur](/wiki/Kuala_Lumpur "Kuala Lumpur"), [Malaysia](/wiki/Malaysia "Malaysia"). It was named after [Almarhum Sultan Salahuddin Abdul Aziz Shah](/wiki/Sultan_Salahuddin "Sultan Salahuddin") of [Selangor](/wiki/Selangor "Selangor"), the eleventh [Yang di-Pertuan Agong](/wiki/Yang_di-Pertuan_Agong "Yang di-Pertuan Agong").

| **[Kuala Lumpur Middle Ring Road 1](/wiki/Kuala_Lumpur_Middle_Ring_Road_1 "Kuala Lumpur Middle Ring Road 1")**  **North** Sentul Segambut Ipoh Kuantan  **South** Jalan Duta Damansara Bangsar Petaling Jaya Seremban | Diamond interchange |
**Persiaran Sultan Salahuddin** Istana Selangor [Tugu Negara](/wiki/Tugu_Negara "Tugu Negara") | T-junctions |

**North** Jalan Dato' Onn [Memorial Tunku Abdul Rahman](/w/index.php?title=Memorial_Tunku_Abdul_Rahman&action=edit&redlink=1 "Memorial Tunku Abdul Rahman (page does not exist)") [Universiti Malaya](/wiki/Universiti_Malaya "Universiti Malaya") (UM) Kampus Kota [Open University of Malaysia](/w/index.php?title=Open_University_of_Malaysia&action=edit&redlink=1 "Open University of Malaysia (page does not exist)") (OUM)  **South** [Malaysian Ministry of Works](/wiki/Malaysian_Ministry_of_Works "Malaysian Ministry of Works") (MOW) main headquarters [Malaysian Public Works Department](/wiki/Malaysian_Public_Works_Department "Malaysian Public Works Department") (JKR) main headquarters Dewan Tan Sri Mahfuz Khalid | Junctions |

**[Jalan Dato' Onn](/wiki/Jalan_Dato%27_Onn "Jalan Dato' Onn")** [Memorial Tunku Abdul Rahman](/w/index.php?title=Memorial_Tunku_Abdul_Rahman&action=edit&redlink=1 "Memorial Tunku Abdul Rahman (page does not exist)") BNM Currency Museum [Bank Negara Komuter station](/wiki/Bank_Negara_Komuter_station "Bank Negara Komuter station") | T-junctions |

| **West** **[Jalan Parlimen](/wiki/Jalan_Parlimen "Jalan Parlimen") (Club Road)** [Malaysian Houses of Parliament](/wiki/Malaysian_Houses_of_Parliament "Malaysian Houses of Parliament") Jalan Duta Damansara [Perdana Lake Gardens](/wiki/Perdana_Lake_Gardens "Perdana Lake Gardens") [Tugu Negara](/wiki/Tugu_Negara "Tugu Negara")    [FT 1](/wiki/Malaysia_Federal_Route_1 "Malaysia Federal Route 1") **[Kuala Lumpur Inner Ring Road](/wiki/Kuala_Lumpur_Inner_Ring_Road "Kuala Lumpur Inner Ring Road")**   **North** **Jalan Kuching** Jalan Sultan Ismail Segambut Ipoh Kuantan  **South** **Jalan Kinabalu** Seremban Petaling Jaya Shah Alam Klang   **Southeast** [Dataran Merdeka](/wiki/Dataran_Merdeka "Dataran Merdeka")  [Sultan Abdul Samad Building](/wiki/Sultan_Abdul_Samad_Building "Sultan Abdul Samad Building") [Selangor Club](/wiki/Selangor_Club "Selangor Club") St Mary's Church Kuala Lumpur City Library | Roundabout |

first_paragraph: **Jalan Sultan Salahuddin** (formerly **Swettenham Road**) is a major road in [Kuala Lumpur](/wiki/Kuala_Lumpur "Kuala Lumpur"), [Malaysia](/wiki/Malaysia "Malaysia"). It was named after [Almarhum Sultan Salahuddin Abdul Aziz Shah](/wiki/Sultan_Salahuddin "Sultan Salahuddin") of [Selangor](/wiki/Selangor "Selangor"), the eleventh [Yang di-Pertuan Agong](/wiki/Yang_di-Pertuan_Agong "Yang di-Pertuan Agong").

**Jalan Sultan Salahuddin** (formerly **Swettenham Road**) is a major road in [Kuala Lumpur](/wiki/Kuala_Lumpur "Kuala Lumpur"), [Malaysia](/wiki/Malaysia "Malaysia"). It was named after [Almarhum Sultan Salahuddin Abdul Aziz Shah](/wiki/Sultan_Salahuddin "Sultan Salahuddin") of [Selangor](/wiki/Selangor "Selangor"), the eleventh [Yang di-Pertuan Agong](/wiki/Yang_di-Pertuan_Agong "Yang di-Pertuan Agong").
